title: CHILD OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH ALBANY CHILD OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists children presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focuses on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high-need children). 445 3rd Avenue SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday 8:30am-5pm, Tuesday 8:30am-6:15pm (541) 497-6205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 967-3866 Main phone (800) 735-2900 TTY/TTD (800) 304-7468 Crisis Line Main phone (541) 497-6205 Toll-free (800) 304-7468 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT OUTPATIENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LINN COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
